programme.title: Super Μπάλα Live
programme.desc: Αναλύσεις, ρεπορτάζ, στιγμιότυπα και ζωντανές συνδέσεις αποτυπώνουν τον παλμό κάθε αγωνιστικής, με την υπογραφή του MEGA. Ξεχωριστή θέση έχει η οπτική ανάλυση των αμφισβητούμενων φάσεων, καθώς και η παρουσίαση των κορυφαίων στιγμιότυπων μέσω εξελιγμένων τρισδιάστατων γραφικών.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League Magazine
programme.desc: Πριν και μετά τις αγωνιστικές του UEFA Champions League, δείτε αποκλειστικές συνεντεύξεις, πλούσια δράση, γκολ και παρασκήνια από τις σπουδαιότερες αναμετρήσεις και τα κεντρικά πρόσωπα.

programme.title: Το Κόκκινο Δωμάτιο Ε4
programme.desc: Επεισόδιο: Ο κύριος Αηβαλής. Η Νόρα και ο Γιάννης, ένα παράνομο ερωτικό ζευγάρι έρχονται με προφυλάξεις στο Κόκκινο Δωμάτιο για να περάσουν δυο ώρες παράνομου σεξ. Υπάρχει, όμως, κάτι που θα τους χαλάσει τη ρομαντική ατμόσφαιρα: Η Νόρα ανακαλύπτει μέσα στη μπανιέρα το πτώμα ενός άντρα.

programme.title: Βέρα στο Δεξί Ε478
programme.desc: Ο Μίλτος πηγαίνει τους κωδικούς στον Άγγελο, την ίδια στιγμή που κι ο Αχιλλέας κρατάει τους δικούς του στα χέρια του. Ο Νικήτας διαβάζει ένα γράμμα του πατέρα του που του μιλάει για το 13ο κλειδί, ενώ ο Αντώνης με την Κλαίρη προσπαθούν να καταλάβουν τι κρύβει ο θησαυρός.

programme.title: Επτά Θανάσιμες Πεθερές
programme.desc: Επεισόδιο: Η Πεθερά Θύμα. Α' Μέρος. Σ' αυτήν τη ζωή υπάρχουν και καλές πεθερές... Καλές και γλυκιές, όπως ακριβώς είναι η κυρά-Βασιλική... Μια τέτοια πεθερά θα 'θελαν κοντά τους όλες οι νύφες. Όλες, εκτός από τη δική της νύφη.

programme.title: Κοινωνία Ώρα MEGA
programme.desc: Το επιτυχημένο δίδυμο μας μεταφέρει για ακόμα μια χρονιά με άποψη, αμεσότητα αλλά και χιούμορ την πρώτη ολοκληρωμένη εικόνα της επικαιρότητα της ημέρας και όλων των θεμάτων που μας απασχολούν.

programme.title: Buongiorno
programme.desc: Το 'Buongiorno' με τη Φαίη Σκορδά συνεχίζει για δεύτερη σεζόν, γεμάτο αισιοδοξία και ενέργεια. Μαζί της: ο Δημήτρης Ουγγαρέζος, η Νάνσυ Νικολαΐδου, η Ευάννα Ζουμπούρογλου, η Κατερίνα Ζαρίφη και ο Άρης Καβατζίκης.

programme.title: Μεσημβρινό Δελτίο Ειδήσεων
programme.desc: Τα γεγονότα στις πραγματικές τους διαστάσεις. Όλες οι εξελίξεις στην ελληνική και διεθνή επικαιρότητα την ώρα που συμβαίνουν. Το πρώτο δελτίο ειδήσεων της ημέρας που δίνει ψύχραιμα και αντικειμενικά μια ολοκληρωμένη εικόνα όλων των σημαντικών ειδήσεων.

programme.title: Δελτίο Νοηματικής
programme.desc: Οι σημαντικότερες ειδήσεις της ημέρας από την Ελλάδα και τον κόσμο.

programme.title: Δύο Ξένοι Ε49 (Ε)
programme.desc: Στο στρατόπεδο της Τρίπολης, η 'Γιορτή του Οπλίτη' πραγματοποιείται με τους σμηνίτες να αποδοκιμάζουν τα παιδιά του 'Καλλιτεχνικού Εργαστηρίου Μαρκορά', που δίνουν τον καλύτερο εαυτό τους στην παράσταση.

programme.title: Live News
programme.desc: Ο Νίκος Ευαγγελάτος ανοίγει ξανά παράθυρο στον κόσμο, φιλτράροντας τις εξελίξεις με τη ματιά της εμπειρίας και της ευθύνης. Διατηρώντας τη γνώριμη πλέον ταυτότητά του και παραμένοντας συντονισμένο με τις απαιτήσεις της εποχής, το 'Live News' συνεχίζει να καινοτομεί.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Η Μαρία Μπεκατώρου αναλαμβάνει να φέρει αντιμέτωπους τους παίκτες με τους πάντοτε ετοιμοπόλεμους Chasers, που έχουν αποδείξει πόσο εύκολα μπορούν να ανταποκριθούν σε έναν καταιγισμό δύσκολων ερωτήσεων. Ποιοι θα καταφέρουν να βγουν αλώβητοι σε αυτό το κυνήγι γνώσεων;

programme.title: Κεντρικό Δελτίο Ειδήσεων
programme.desc: Κάθε σημαντικό γεγονός που ενδιαφέρει τους πολίτες από την Ελλάδα και τον κόσμο κάθε βράδυ είναι MEGA ΓΕΓΟΝΟΤΑ. Η δημοσιογραφική ομάδα του MEGA ερευνά, παρουσιάζει, αναλύει και σχολιάζει την πραγματικότητα με αμεσότητα, αξιοπιστία, εγκυρότητα, χωρίς εντυπωσιασμούς.

programme.title: MEGA Αθλητικά
programme.desc: Powered by Stoiximan. Αθλητική επικαιρότητα.

programme.title: Δελτίο Καιρού
programme.desc: Δελτίο καιρού.

programme.title: Μια Νύχτα Μόνο Ε37
programme.desc: Ο Οδυσσέας καταφέρνει να σώσει την Αρετή από τα χέρια του παρανοϊκού φωτογράφου, ενώ η Ελένη αποφασίζει επιτέλους να ανοίξει την καρδιά της στον Σταύρο και να του πει την αλήθεια για το παρελθόν της σε σχέση με τη Μιρέλλα. Η Κατερίνη αναζητά τον Οδυσσέα.

programme.title: Η Γη της Ελιάς Κ5 Ε82
programme.desc: Οι γιατροί παλεύουν να κρατήσουν τον Παυλή στη ζωή. Βυθισμένος στις υποψίες, ο Παρασκευάς πιέζει τη Βασιλική να παρακολουθήσει τη Φρύνη. Εκείνη ταλαντεύεται και τελικά του λέει ένα ψέμα που σύντομα θα αποδειχθεί μοιραίο. Η Ισμήνη νιώθει πως ο κόσμος της γκρεμίζεται.

programme.title: Mega Stories
programme.desc: Είμαστε οι ιστορίες μας: Αληθινές, τρυφερές, σκληρές, μεγαλειώδεις. Η Δώρα Αναγνωστοπούλου και η ομάδα της δίνουν βήμα σε συνανθρώπους μας που έχουν να μας διηγηθούν κάτι. Αυτό το 'κάτι' μας αφορά. Μας θυμίζει, πολλές φορές, τα δικά μας βιώματα.

programme.title: L.A.P.D. Ε1
programme.desc: Ο Προκόπης, ο Θωμάς και ο Λουκάς είναι τρεις αστυνομικοί που είχαν την... ατυχία να είναι παρόντες σε μια ληστεία τραπέζης και να μην την πάρουν χαμπάρι! Η συνέπεια είναι να μετατεθούν στο χειρότερο αστυνομικό τμήμα της πόλης.

programme.title: L.A.P.D. Ε1
programme.desc: Ο Προκόπης, ο Θωμάς και ο Λουκάς είναι τρεις αστυνομικοί που είχαν την... ατυχία να είναι παρόντες σε μια ληστεία τραπέζης και να μην την πάρουν χαμπάρι! Η συνέπεια είναι να μετατεθούν στο χειρότερο αστυνομικό τμήμα της πόλης.

programme.title: Μίλα μου Βρώμικα Ε21
programme.desc: Επεισόδιο: Η δε γυνή ίνα φοβήται τον άνδρα. Ο δικηγόρος Μπράτος ψάχνει την παρέα για να τους ανακοινώσει ένα καινούργιο μεγάλο πρόβλημα.

programme.title: Παλίρροια Ε1
programme.desc: Ελληνική δραματική σειρά, παραγωγής 1996. Ο Δημήτρης, ένας δυναμικός επιχειρηματίας, μετά από ένα αυτοκινητιστικό δυστύχημα μένει ανάπηρος, καθηλωμένος για πάντα σε μια αναπηρική καρέκλα! Ο ευτυχισμένος γάμος του με την Αλεξάνδρα γίνεται πια ένας εφιάλτης.

programme.title: Βέρα στο Δεξί Ε479
programme.desc: Η Ρεγγίνα ρίχνει στον Αμιρά τις ευθύνες για την απαγωγή της Ειρήνης, ενώ αυτός κινητοποιεί τους ανθρώπους του για να βρουν τους απαγωγείς. Η Έλσα βγαίνει απ' το νοσοκομείο και μαθαίνει για την αρπαγή του παιδιού, ενώ ο Αμιράς απειλεί τον Αχιλλέα ότι αν δε βρει την Ειρήνη, θα χάσει τη δουλειά του.

programme.desc: Η περίφημη ημέρα γάμου του Νίκου Στεφάνου σημαδεύεται από γεγονότα που κάνουν έξαλλη τη Μαρία Ελένη, η οποία συνειδητοποιεί ότι δεν θα ξεφορτωθεί εύκολα τους εφτά ιδιοκτήτες του Μπάρμπα Δήμος Club.

programme.title: Παλίρροια Ε2
programme.desc: Η Αλεξάνδρα πηγαίνει στην κρουαζιέρα, στην οποία την κάλεσε η Μπέτυ. Εκεί συναντά δυο ακόμη ζευγάρια. Ο Κώστας και η Μπέτυ τής γνωρίζουν τον Νικήτα και την προτρέπουν να διασκεδάσει μαζί του. Εντωμεταξύ, στο μπιλιάρδο, ο Έκτορας συναντά τον Μανούσο.

programme.title: Βέρα στο Δεξί Ε480
programme.desc: Η Ρεγγίνα σπαράζει για την απαγωγή της Ειρήνης. Ο Στράτος τρελαμένος απειλεί να μην αφήσει τίποτα όρθιο. Οι έρευνες της αστυνομίας δεν προχωράνε και ο Αμιράς πιέζει τον Αχιλλέα. Η Ρεγγίνα δηλώνει πως αν πάθει κάτι η κόρη της δεν την θέλει την ζωή της.

programme.title: Επτά Θανάσιμες Πεθερές
programme.desc: Επεισόδιο: Η Πεθερά Θύμα. Μέρος Γ'. Σ' αυτήν τη ζωή υπάρχουν και καλές πεθερές... Καλές και γλυκιές, όπως ακριβώς είναι η κυρά-Βασιλική... Μια τέτοια πεθερά θα 'θελαν κοντά τους όλες οι νύφες. Όλες, εκτός από τη δική της νύφη.

programme.title: Κοινωνία Ώρα MEGA
programme.desc: Το επιτυχημένο δίδυμο μας μεταφέρει για ακόμα μια χρονιά με άποψη, αμεσότητα αλλά και χιούμορ την πρώτη ολοκληρωμένη εικόνα της επικαιρότητα της ημέρας και όλων των θεμάτων που μας απασχολούν.

programme.title: Buongiorno
programme.desc: Το 'Buongiorno' με τη Φαίη Σκορδά συνεχίζει για δεύτερη σεζόν, γεμάτο αισιοδοξία και ενέργεια. Μαζί της: ο Δημήτρης Ουγγαρέζος, η Νάνσυ Νικολαΐδου, η Ευάννα Ζουμπούρογλου, η Κατερίνα Ζαρίφη και ο Άρης Καβατζίκης.

programme.title: Μεσημβρινό Δελτίο Ειδήσεων
programme.desc: Τα γεγονότα στις πραγματικές τους διαστάσεις. Όλες οι εξελίξεις στην ελληνική και διεθνή επικαιρότητα την ώρα που συμβαίνουν. Το πρώτο δελτίο ειδήσεων της ημέρας που δίνει ψύχραιμα και αντικειμενικά μια ολοκληρωμένη εικόνα όλων των σημαντικών ειδήσεων.

programme.title: Δελτίο Νοηματικής
programme.desc: Οι σημαντικότερες ειδήσεις της ημέρας από την Ελλάδα και τον κόσμο.

programme.title: Δύο Ξένοι Ε51 (Ε)
programme.desc: Η Μαρίνα έχει βρει καταφύγιο στο χωριό της, όταν ξαφνικά την πιάνουν οι πόνοι της γέννας και πηγαίνει με τη μητέρα της στο Ιατρικό Κέντρο Ορχομενού. Εκεί, την αναλαμβάνουν δυο γυναίκες, μια γιατρός και μια νοσοκόμα.

programme.title: Live News
programme.desc: Ο Νίκος Ευαγγελάτος ανοίγει ξανά παράθυρο στον κόσμο, φιλτράροντας τις εξελίξεις με τη ματιά της εμπειρίας και της ευθύνης. Διατηρώντας τη γνώριμη πλέον ταυτότητά του και παραμένοντας συντονισμένο με τις απαιτήσεις της εποχής, το 'Live News' συνεχίζει να καινοτομεί.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Η Μαρία Μπεκατώρου αναλαμβάνει να φέρει αντιμέτωπους τους παίκτες με τους πάντοτε ετοιμοπόλεμους Chasers, που έχουν αποδείξει πόσο εύκολα μπορούν να ανταποκριθούν σε έναν καταιγισμό δύσκολων ερωτήσεων. Ποιοι θα καταφέρουν να βγουν αλώβητοι σε αυτό το κυνήγι γνώσεων;

programme.title: Κεντρικό Δελτίο Ειδήσεων
programme.desc: Κάθε σημαντικό γεγονός που ενδιαφέρει τους πολίτες από την Ελλάδα και τον κόσμο κάθε βράδυ είναι MEGA ΓΕΓΟΝΟΤΑ. Η δημοσιογραφική ομάδα του MEGA ερευνά, παρουσιάζει, αναλύει και σχολιάζει την πραγματικότητα με αμεσότητα, αξιοπιστία, εγκυρότητα, χωρίς εντυπωσιασμούς.

programme.title: MEGA Αθλητικά
programme.desc: Powered by Stoiximan. Αθλητική επικαιρότητα.

programme.title: Δελτίο Καιρού
programme.desc: Δελτίο καιρού.

programme.title: Αλ Τσαντίρι Νουζ
programme.desc: Ο Λάκης Λαζόπουλος επιστρέφει για δεύτερη σεζόν στο MEGA και υπόσχεται ακόμη περισσότερη σάτιρα. Στο πλευρό του αγαπημένου δημιουργού πάνω στη σκηνή θα βρίσκονται και φέτος καλλιτέχνες στους οποίους εμπιστεύεται διαχρονικά τα κείμενά του και μαζί δίνουν παλμό και ζωντάνια στην εκπομπή.

programme.title: Μια Νύχτα Μόνο Ε38 (Ε)
programme.desc: Ο Οδυσσέας καταφέρνει να σώσει την Αρετή από τα χέρια του παρανοϊκού φωτογράφου, ενώ η Ελένη αποφασίζει επιτέλους να ανοίξει την καρδιά της στον Σταύρο και να του πει την αλήθεια για το παρελθόν της σε σχέση με τη Μιρέλλα.

programme.title: L.A.P.D. Ε2
programme.desc: Ο Προκόπης, ο Θωμάς, ο Λουκάς κι ένα ... πτώμα στήνουν παγίδα προκειμένου να συλλάβουν τους ληστές της τράπεζας. Την ίδια ώρα, η Όλγα συναντά μετά από χρόνια μια παιδική της φίλη, τη Λίτσα, με τη βοήθεια της οποίας βρίσκει μια μάλλον ιδιαίτερη δουλειά.

programme.title: L.A.P.D. Ε2
programme.desc: Ο Προκόπης, ο Θωμάς, ο Λουκάς κι ένα ... πτώμα στήνουν παγίδα προκειμένου να συλλάβουν τους ληστές της τράπεζας. Την ίδια ώρα, η Όλγα συναντά μετά από χρόνια μια παιδική της φίλη, τη Λίτσα, με τη βοήθεια της οποίας βρίσκει μια μάλλον ιδιαίτερη δουλειά.

programme.title: Μίλα μου Βρώμικα Ε23
programme.desc: Επεισόδιο: Τέλος Εποχής. Ο δικηγόρος Μπράτος συμβουλεύει την παρέα να φύγουν και να κρυφτούν για να γλιτώσουν το αυτόφωρο. Εκείνοι ακολουθούν τη συμβουλή του και καταφεύγουν στο φορτηγό - ψυγείο του κρεοπωλείου 'ΕΛΒΙΣ'.

programme.title: Παλίρροια Ε3
programme.desc: Η Αλεξάνδρα επιστρέφει στο σπίτι, ιδιαίτερα ενοχλημένη από όσα συνέβησαν στην κρουαζιέρα. Ο Δημήτρης αντιλαμβάνεται αμέσως την ταραχή της και προσπαθεί να καταλάβει τι της συνέβη. Η Νάντια, ο Έκτορας, ο Πέτρος και η Τζένη βγαίνουν για να διασκεδάσουν.

programme.title: Βέρα στο Δεξί Ε481
programme.desc: Οι απαγωγείς ελευθερώνουν τη μικρή Ειρήνη. Η Δανάη δέχεται ένα τηλεφώνημα από Νότιο Αφρική ότι ο Μιχάλης (πατέρας της Λήδας) έπαθε έμφραγμα και νοσηλεύεται σε κρίσιμη κατάσταση. Σε μία συζήτηση με τον Μίλτο, αυτός της αφήνει υπονοούμενα για τη σχέση της με τον Μιχάλη.

programme.title: Επτά Θανάσιμες Πεθερές
programme.desc: Επεισόδιο: Η Αλανιάρα πεθερά. Μέρος Α'. Ο Αλέκος, αμέσως μετά από τον θάνατο της αγαπημένης του μητέρας, ανακαλύπτει ότι η πραγματική του μητέρα δεν ήταν αυτή που πέθανε, αλλά μια ξεπεσμένη τραγουδιάρα, η Φλώρα. Ο Αλέκος τη φέρνει σπίτι.

programme.title: Κοινωνία Ώρα MEGA
programme.desc: Το επιτυχημένο δίδυμο μας μεταφέρει για ακόμα μια χρονιά με άποψη, αμεσότητα αλλά και χιούμορ την πρώτη ολοκληρωμένη εικόνα της επικαιρότητα της ημέρας και όλων των θεμάτων που μας απασχολούν.

programme.desc: Το 'Buongiorno' με τη Φαίη Σκορδά συνεχίζει για δεύτερη σεζόν, γεμάτο αισιοδοξία και ενέργεια. Μαζί της: ο Δημήτρης Ουγγαρέζος, η Νάνσυ Νικολαΐδου, η Ευάννα Ζουμπούρογλου, η Κατερίνα Ζαρίφη και ο Άρης Καβατζίκης.

programme.desc: Οι σημαντικότερες ειδήσεις της ημέρας από την Ελλάδα και τον κόσμο.

programme.title: Δύο Ξένοι Ε52 (Ε)
programme.desc: Τα δίδυμα έχουν κλέψει τις καρδιές όλων, ενώ οι 'διάλογοι' μεταξύ τους είναι απολαυστικοί! Οι δυο γιαγιάδες Ντένη και Ζωίτσα συνεχίζουν τη σχέση αγάπης-μίσους, ενώ ο Κωνσταντίνος βρίσκει τις πιο απίθανες δικαιολογίες για να βλέπει τα παιδιά του.

programme.title: Live News
programme.desc: Ο Νίκος Ευαγγελάτος ανοίγει ξανά παράθυρο στον κόσμο, φιλτράροντας τις εξελίξεις με τη ματιά της εμπειρίας και της ευθύνης. Διατηρώντας τη γνώριμη πλέον ταυτότητά του και παραμένοντας συντονισμένο με τις απαιτήσεις της εποχής, το 'Live News' συνεχίζει να καινοτομεί.

programme.title: Δελτίο Καιρού
programme.desc: Δελτίο καιρού.

programme.title: Μια Νύχτα Μόνο Ε39
programme.desc: Η Αρετή απαντάει θετικά στην πρόταση γάμου του Οδυσσέα, ψάχνοντας όμως να βρει τρόπο για να το πει στο παιδί. Η Κατερίνη ταράζεται βλέποντας τη Μαργαρίτα να ανοίγεται στον Οδυσσέα σε σχέση με το παρελθόν της στην Κρήτη, ενώ η Αννέζα νιώθει για πρώτη φορά να κινδυνεύει τόσο πολύ το μυστικό της.

programme.title: Οι Αθώοι Ε2
programme.desc: Μια νεαρή νεοκόρισσα σώζει την Αρετή από την αυτοκτονία. Μητέρα και γιος επιστρέφουν στο σπίτι των Αχάτηδων. Το 1906, ο Γιάννος και ο Πέτρος, νεαροί άνδρες πια, είναι ερωτευμένοι με τη Μαργαρίτα. Ο ανταγωνισμός μεταξύ τους φουντώνει.

programme.title: Βίλατζ Λιμπερταδόρες
programme.desc: ΠΡΕΜΙΕΡΑ. Ένα αθλητικό-ταξιδιωτικό ντοκιμαντέρ που έρχεται για να μας ταξιδέψει στις διαχρονικές αξίες της ομαδικότητας, της φιλίας και της κοινότητας. Στα χωριά του Έβρου, της Ηπείρου, της Κρήτης και στα νησιά της άγονης γραμμής, το κυριακάτικο ντέρμπι δεν είναι απλά άλλος ένας αγώνας ποδοσφαίρου.

programme.title: L.A.P.D. Ε3
programme.desc: Ο μάρτυρας περνά... μαρτύρια στα 'χέρια' της ομάδας του Προκόπη, την ίδια ώρα που το φλερτ της Ζωής προς τον Λουκά γίνεται ολοένα και πιο έντονο. Η Όλγα -με τη βοήθεια της Λίτσας- αρχίζει να έχει βάσιμες υποψίες πως ο Προκόπης την απατά.

programme.title: L.A.P.D. Ε3
programme.desc: Ο μάρτυρας περνά... μαρτύρια στα 'χέρια' της ομάδας του Προκόπη, την ίδια ώρα που το φλερτ της Ζωής προς τον Λουκά γίνεται ολοένα και πιο έντονο. Η Όλγα -με τη βοήθεια της Λίτσας- αρχίζει να έχει βάσιμες υποψίες πως ο Προκόπης την απατά.

programme.title: Μίλα μου Βρώμικα Ε24
programme.desc: Επεισόδιο: Absolutely Fabulous. Η αγάπη είναι μεγάλο πακέτο. Ο Τριαντάφυλλος έχει δίλημμα για το αν πρέπει να προχωρήσει με το δίσκο ή όχι, ενώ η Ρίτα φεύγει για Θεσσαλονίκη και ο Σωτήρης σκέφτεται αν πρέπει να την ακολουθήσει. Έκτακτη συμμετοχή: Αννα Βίσση.

programme.title: Παλίρροια Ε4
programme.desc: Ο Κώστας ζητάει από την Αλεξάνδρα μια κρυφή συνάντηση. Εκεί, την εκβιάζει με μια κασέτα που μαγνητοσκόπησε στην κρουαζιέρα. Ως αντάλλαγμα για τη σιωπή του, της ζητά να πείσει τον Δημήτρη να τον βοηθήσει. Η Αλεξάνδρα, όμως, αρνείται να υποκύψει στον εκβιασμό.

programme.title: Βέρα στο Δεξί Ε482
programme.desc: Ο Στράτος ετοιμάζεται να σκοτώσει τους απαγωγείς, αλλά ο Αμιράς στέλνει δικό του άνθρωπο και τον απαλλάσσει. Η Ρεγγίνα αποφασίζει να μάθει το μυστικό του 13ου κλειδιού και πιέζει τον Αμιρά να της πει. Το μυστικό της αποκαλύπτεται.

programme.title: Επτά Θανάσιμες Πεθερές
programme.desc: Επεισόδιο: Η Αλανιάρα πεθερά. Μέρος Β'. Ο Αλέκος, αμέσως μετά από τον θάνατο της αγαπημένης του μητέρας, ανακαλύπτει ότι η πραγματική του μητέρα δεν ήταν αυτή που πέθανε, αλλά μια ξεπεσμένη τραγουδιάρα, η Φλώρα. Ο Αλέκος τη φέρνει σπίτι.

programme.title: Δύο Ξένοι Ε53 (Ε)
programme.desc: Ο Κωνσταντίνος και η Μαρίνα περνούν κάποιες στιγμές οικογενειακής ευτυχίας, όταν ο Αίαντας τους πιάνει στα πράσα και γίνεται η μεγάλη αποκάλυψη για την πατρότητα των παιδιών. Η Μαρίνα αναζητά όνομα πατέρα για τα παιδιά της και ο Κωνσταντίνος για άλλη μια φορά κυριεύεται από τον φόβο του.

programme.title: Μια Τρελή, Τρελή Οικογένεια
programme.desc: Μία νιόπαντρη γυναίκα έρχεται με τον σύζυγό της από την Ιταλία στην Ελλάδα, για να μείνει με τη θεότρελη οικογένειά της. (100')

programme.title: Φως στο Τούνελ
programme.desc: Για 31η χρονιά η Αγγελική Νικολούλη ρίχνει 'φως' σε σκοτεινές υποθέσεις. Μυστηριώδεις εξαφανίσεις, ανεξιχνίαστες δολοφονίες, ύποπτοι θάνατοι. Ιστορίες που ζητούν απαντήσεις και απασχολούν έντονα την κοινή γνώμη. Επίμονες έρευνες με την συμμετοχή τηλεθεατών και ειδικών συνεργατών.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed investigate burglaries in a wealthy neighborhood.

programme.title: Toon in With Me
programme.desc: Bill and Toony the Tuna showcase classic cartoons featuring characters like Bugs Bunny and more.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally plays tennis with a girl who is out to spite her boyfriend.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver and his friends buy monster sweatshirts.

programme.desc: Mason defends a youthful girl who is accused of murdering her stepfather with a homemade bomb.

programme.desc: A foreign agent exposes McGarrett to the possibility of germ warfare.

programme.title: Way of the Wicked
programme.desc: When a town is swept by a series of gruesome killings, a mysterious priest (Christian Slater) seems to be the only one who can help protect them from a truth more evil than any of them could have imagined.

programme.title: Ghoul
programme.desc: A boy (Nolan Gould) and his friends seek the truth behind a sinister local legend after a teenage couple goes missing in the town cemetery.

programme.title: Infected
programme.desc: Seven strangers try to escape from Los Angeles after a strange virus that mutates humans is released.

programme.title: Centigrade
programme.desc: A man and his pregnant wife become trapped in their car when a storm buries them underneath layers of snow and ice. As supplies dwindle and temperatures plunge, the couple must battle the elements and hypothermia in a desperate fight for survival.

programme.title: The Invoking 2
programme.desc: Waking nightmares, bloodthirsty spirits, demonic forces, and vengeful poltergeists visit horror upon their victims in this anthology.

programme.title: Pay the Ghost

programme.title: Airborne
programme.desc: A plane takes off during a snowstorm and soon reports both pilots are dead. As the passengers slowly die off, they wish they had never left the ground.

programme.title: State of Emergency
programme.desc: Survivors band together after an explosion at a military bioweapons plant turns most of their neighbors into flesh-eating zombies.

programme.desc: This week in the Welsh heat newcomer Andrew Birch is challenging two returning chefs, Adam Bannister and Phil Carmichael. It is the dessert course and one chef will go home.

programme.title: Great British Menu

programme.desc: It is the fish course and the chefs are using some of the UKs best seafood: lobster, salmon and Cornish crab. Daniel Smith may be classically trained but hes decided to take a risk adding a cheese custard to his lobster dish.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Two chefs are cooking venison. Danny Gill is making a venison wellington, inspired by his Dad, a former RAF chef who has served up Wellington for royalty. While Andrew Scott has sourced his venison from the Queens Scottish estate, Balmoral.

programme.title: Great British Menu

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the all important main course and returning contender Mark Froydenlund is banking on it being his strongest dish. Hes showcasing British Rose veal and celebrating the determination of British producers to bounce back from disaster.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today the two chefs are cooking for the judges Matthew Fort, Prue Leith and Oliver Peyton. Joining them is guest judge is John Williams MBE, the executive Head Chef at The Ritz, the only hotel to hold a royal warrant for banqueting.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: This week three top chefs from Northern Ireland are competing for a place in the National Finals. There are some varied and exciting starters, as the chefs get creative. And theres real shock and emotion as the veteran chef delivers his scores.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today the atmosphere in the kitchen gets even more competitive as the three chefs from Northern Ireland dish cook their fish courses.

programme.title: Great British Menu

programme.title: Great British Menu

programme.desc: An uncooperative inmate complicates things. A man charged with DUI complains about the prison food. A security guard arrested for robbery fears that her dream job with Homeland Security is gone.

programme.title: Alan Cummings: Paradise Homes
programme.sub-title: Alan Cummings Paradise Homes S01 E04 - Hidden Hillside Havens
programme.desc: Alan treks up Northwest coast of Italy, where a seamless subterranean villa is camouflaged into the scenic Ligurian hills overlooking the tranquil Rivera. With an unexpected abundance of luxurious living space, interior patios filled with lush greenery match the breath-taking views of the outdoors. Next, heading southwest via tractor to the Dromara Hills of Ireland, Alan explores a sleek matte-black modern barn which elegantly fuses both modern and traditional farm styles. With windows the size of walls, this farmhouse provides shelter that doesn’t exclude but enhances the experience of nature.

programme.title: Travel Man
programme.sub-title: Travel Man S07 E01 - 48 Hours In Zurich
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and Frank Skinner navigate Zurich’s pristine streets, quirky museums, molten fondue, and alpine adventures with razor sharp banter, existential detours, and a pedalo ride that tests both their stomachs and their friendship.

programme.title: Travel Man
programme.sub-title: Travel Man S07 E02 - 48 Hours In Ibiza
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and Jessica Knappett plunge into Ibiza’s surreal side clubbing, foraging, gong-bathing, and failing at pizza, blending boho absurdity with wit as they uncover the island’s magnetic pull and quirky contradictions over 48 chaotic hours.

programme.title: Travel Man
programme.sub-title: Travel Man S07 E03 - 48 Hours In Ljubljana
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and Eddie Izzard unravel Ljubljana’s eccentric charm sampling raw milk, exploring mythical dragon lore, spelunking in Europe’s most visited cave, and tobogganing past existential dread, all while quipping through Slovenia’s capital with gleeful absurdity.

programme.title: Travel Man
programme.sub-title: Travel Man S07 E04 - 48 Hours In Milan
programme.desc: "Richard Ayoade and Morgana Robinson dive into Milan’s iconic fashion, flaky frescoes, rooftop views, ravioli making, bocce battles, and secret cocktails, wrapping wit and chaos around Italy’s most stylish city in a two-day cultural whirlwind.

programme.title: Race Across the World
programme.sub-title: Race Across The World S04 E06 - Islands to Indonesia
programme.desc: Four teams leave Thailand’s paradise beaches and race 2,000km across Malaysia to Sumatra. With budgets vanishing and tensions rising, bold choices could make or break their journey.

programme.title: DW Euromaxx At Its Best
programme.sub-title: Euromaxx At Its Best E02 - France At Its Best
programme.desc: France is full of exciting secrets. Discover with us who is behind the feather decorations for the Moulin Rouge, the dark side of Mont Saint-Michel Island and how the world-famous champagne is made.

programme.title: Race Across the World
programme.sub-title: Race Across The World S04 E07 - Roads to Jakarta
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode the finish line nears, the four remaining teams battle exhaustion, dwindling budgets, and unpredictable roads across Sumatra — where every mile and every mistake could decide the race.

programme.title: DW Euromaxx At Its Best
programme.sub-title: Euromaxx At Its Best E03 - Italy At Its Best
programme.desc: Admire Rome without digging too deep into your pockets, feel the magical atmosphere of the carnival in Venice, learn how a Borsalino hat is made and savour a delicious Italian gelato.

programme.title: Epic Trails S02 E01 - Papua New Guinea NB
programme.desc: Eric travels to Papua New Guinea, hiking the Kokoda Trail.

programme.title: Rock The Park
programme.sub-title: Rock The Park S05 E23 - Best Of The West
programme.desc: Jack and Colton are looking back on some of their best adventures in the wild west. Included: Hiking to the top of the Continental Divide, exploring a mystery in Death Valley, and scuba diving a kelp forest in the Channel Islands.

programme.title: Rock The Park
programme.sub-title: Rock The Park S05 E24 - Best Of Wild Alaska
programme.desc: The most remote state in the U.S. never disappoints - from the rapids of Aniakchak, to the “white thunder” of Glacier Bay, to the sled dogs of Denali. Join Colton and Jack as they revisit their most epic and wild Alaskan adventures.

programme.title: Chasing The Sun: Asia
programme.sub-title: Chasing The Sun S02 E02 - Vietnam
programme.desc: Stephen immerses himself in local culture, learning about generations worth of traditions from barber shops to mask-making.

programme.title: Travel Man
programme.sub-title: Travel Man S06 E01 - Brussels With Lee Mack
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade returns to provide much needed guidance and inspiration to would-be mini-breakers. This time, Richard is joined by comedian Lee Mack for a funny, yet surprisingly informative, 48 hours in Brussels - featuring culture, comics, pralines, puppets and attractions both large and small, including the Grand Place and the famous atom-shaped Atomium. There's also waffles, mussels - including Moules Genghis Khan - and the secrets of chocolate making.

programme.title: Travel Man
programme.sub-title: Travel Man S06 E02 - Oslo With Fay Ripley
programme.desc: Richard is joined by actor Fay Ripley for a wintry mini-break in Oslo. Together they pack two days with sledging, screaming, skiing, sculpture and scoff.

programme.title: Travel Man
programme.sub-title: Travel Man S06 E03 - Madeira With Robert Webb
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by comic actor and writer Robert Webb - the destination Madeira. Together they seek to discover more than the Portuguese island's eponymous wine and cake, although both are sampled along the way. Madeira is famed for its bananas and for the culinary bravado of combining them with fish.

programme.title: Travel Man
programme.sub-title: Travel Man S06 E04 - Cote DAzur With Shazia Mirza
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by comedian Shazia Mirza for a fancy two day detour on the Côte d'Azur, in the south of France. In Nice they hire a three-wheeled 'Nice Car' for a scenic tour of the city. They also scope out Cap Ferrat, blue art, fancy yachts, and a grotto in Monaco. Later, there's a pricey helicopter ride and a trip to the casino - in a bid to win back the budget overspend on the helicopter.

programme.title: In Search of Food
programme.sub-title: In Search Of Food S01 E04 - Boulder, Colorado
programme.desc: Scott meets up with celebrated author, chef and educator, Ann Cooper. In 2009, Ann founded Food Family Farming Foundation as a nonprofit focusing on solutions to the school food crisis. F3's pivotal project is The Lunch Box - a web portal that provides free and accessible tools, recipes and community connections to support school food reform.

programme.title: In Search of Food
programme.sub-title: In Search Of Food S01 E05 - Shenandoah Valley, Virginia
programme.desc: Scott visits with Joel Salatin, who came to prominence in the local food movement when Michael Pollan’s NY Times bestseller ‘The Omnivore’s Dilemma’ held up his Virginian farm as the best model in America for sustainable farming.

programme.title: Paradise Kitchen Bali
programme.sub-title: Paradise Kitchen Bali S01 E09 Mushroom
programme.desc: Indulge in Lauren's exploration of the chocolate world as she uncovers its unique types and characteristics. From savory chocolate salsa to raw vegan cake, her mix of sweet and savory recipes leaves a lasting appreciation for this beloved ingredient.

programme.title: Paradise Kitchen Bali
programme.sub-title: Paradise Kitchen Bali S01 E10 Chocolate
programme.desc: Lauren dives into the fascinating world of mushrooms, exploring their flavors, textures, and health benefits. She shows how to make savory mushroom sausage rolls and delicious mushroom steaks, showcasing the versatility of these earthy ingredients.

programme.title: DW Euromaxx à la Carte
programme.sub-title: Euromaxx À La Carte E109 - Mallorca’s White Gold, Baking Grannies
programme.desc: A Spanish National Dish: The Tortilla. Smørrebrød: More Than Just a Sandwich. Purely Plant-Based: Vegan Sausage and Cheese. Mallorca’s White Gold Greek Wine. Aging in the Aegean The Baking Grannies of Vienna.

programme.title: DW Euromaxx à la Carte
programme.sub-title: Euromaxx À La Carte E110 - Icelandic Cuisine, Raclette, Croissants, Pubs
programme.desc: Modern Icelandic Cuisine on the Westman Islands. A Typical Oktoberfest Treat: Bavarian Schweinshaxe The World’s Oldest Sweet. White: Tokaji Wine from Hungary Traditional Raclette - A Specialty From Switzerland. A Love Letter to England’s Pub Culture. Can Real Croissants do Without Butter?

programme.title: Andiamo!UPTOWN
programme.sub-title: Andiamo! UPTOWN S01 E14 - Montreal, Canada NB
programme.desc: Donna visits Montreal and will explore some of the great Quebecois cultural and epicurean wonders of this amazing metropolitan city. In addition she will try jet boating as well as learn more about why Montreal the unofficial "world headquarters" for the circus arts.

programme.title: Andiamo!UPTOWN
programme.sub-title: Andiamo! UPTOWN S01 E15 - Catalina Island, California NB
programme.desc: In this episode, Donna journey's to one of California's most unique islands for some horseback riding, history, art and a bevy of food!

programme.title: Andiamo!UPTOWN
programme.sub-title: Andiamo! UPTOWN S01 E16 - Jasper & Edmonton, Alberta, Canada Part 1 NB
programme.desc: There's so much snow in this episode and Donna enjoys it to the fullest! From snow-biking to ice walking to staying at a world-renowned resort, you will enjoy winter offerings in more ways than you can imagine - which is why this episode is a two-parter!

programme.title: Andiamo!UPTOWN
programme.sub-title: Andiamo! UPTOWN S01 E17 - Jasper & Edmonton, Alberta, Canada Part 2 NB
programme.desc: As a continuation from Part 1, Donna enjoys some very fresh food and crafts at a local farmer's market, tries out snowshoeing and even learns how to ski!

programme.title: The RVers
programme.sub-title: The RVers S01 E12 - Conquering Alaska, RV Insurance
programme.desc: Tom & Cait take us through an Alaskan expedition as they live out the lifelong dream of many RVers.

programme.title: The RVers

programme.title: DW Cities Reinvented
programme.sub-title: Cities Reinvented E03 - Singapore - Embracing Nature
programme.desc: Singapore is arguably the world’s most modern metropolis. The small island state with a growing population needs to plan land use and construction carefully. It has become a pioneer in eco-friendly energy-saving urban development. The regulations are stringent: any green space lost when a new building goes up must be replaced somewhere else. The city is creating a new generation of green skyscrapers that harvest rainwater and run on solar power.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Lindsey decides to take on a vegan diet and lifestyle, but she may have ulterior motives in doing so.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Nick tries to give his family the best vacation ever but things do not go well at all.

programme.desc: Lindsey steals sixty dollars from Gigi's wallet and turns back around and blames Kevin for it.

programme.desc: Kevin and Nick goes to an R-rated movie, but Kevin has nightmares from seeing it.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Nick and Suzanne go head to head in the kitchen when Nick says cooking is \\"easy\\" and Suzanne challenges him to a family cooking competition.

programme.desc: Suzanne tries to return an unlikely gift from Marilyin with Nick not knowing.

programme.desc: Suzanne gets arrested and decides to change her stubborn ways.

programme.desc: The family tries become environmental friendly with each other but chaos ensures

programme.desc: Lindsey gets her first job at a fast food restaurant, but soon gets fired when she gives out free food.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Nick tries to become a more effective parent, so he pushes Kevin and Lindsey to become better people.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Against Nick's wishes, Suzanne buys an expensive purse and Nick becomes suspicious about it, so he uses her guilt to his advantage.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the first football game approaches, Kelli and Judy watch tape on AT&T Stadium's famously large HD screens to see who is game day-ready -- and figure out the final cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy make the emotional final cuts, dreams come true when the 2018 DCC squad is announced, and the women hit the field for their first game.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of hopefuls arrive at AT&T Stadium to start the rigorous audition process for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders, competing for the fewest number of open spots ever.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 101 remaining hopefuls must master tough choreography, learn the famous DCC kick line and impress judges Melissa Rycroft and Charm La'Donna.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates give panel interviews and solo performances before the rookies and veterans face off on the field and find out who makes it to training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is on at training camp as both rookie and veteran candidates give it their all in front of their toughest audience yet.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli gives the ladies a tough kick line and jump-split workout, and choreographer Travis Wall teaches them a modern dance that will determine their future in the competition.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli gives the ladies a tough kick line and jump-split workout, and choreographer Travis Wall teaches them a modern dance that will determine their future in the competition.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Charm La'Donna teaches the candidates a hip-hop-style routine, the judges pick their charm squad, the ladies visit the Dallas VA Medical Center and two rookies are sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Charm La'Donna teaches the candidates a hip-hop-style routine, the judges pick their charm squad, the ladies visit the Dallas VA Medical Center and two rookies are sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates audition for the show group, an honorary contingent of 18 cheerleaders who represent the DCC on USO tours and TV, in front of guest judge Cheryl Burke.

programme.desc: Emmy-winner Tyce Diorio teaches the ladies to bring the magic as he puts them through a tough routine. Evan Miller challenges the DCC's power and musicality.

programme.desc: Chester gets a letter from his uncle Sunday, a 'crook', on his upcoming trip to Dodge city. When he arrives with a niece, he finds he has to watch them both or what they have planned just might work, at his expense.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A slick city reporter sets out to prove that even a milquetoast can pass for a feared gunfighter, if a few well-placed tidbits of rumor precede him.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: The "town fool" has a chance to change his life when he learns that a famous general, now on his deathbed, believes him to be his long-lost son.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: The town drunk who saw a man drowned, believes it was dream, until he meets up with the guy who did the drowning.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Quint says that white renegades, not Indians, are the cause of recent raids around Dodge. Working shotgun on the stage, he proves his point when he is attacked, then pursued by those renegades. His "Indian" skills save him and a colonel's daughter who has

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A father's dying request is that Matt go to retrieve his daughter. Expecting to find a little girl, Matt finds a near-grown woman, but one who's wild and desperately in need of civilizing.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: When a young pretty farm woman becomes attracted to and sees some good in a would-be robber, she refuses to identify him.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Chance Hopper is Matt's young foster brother, torn between loyalty to Matt and to his partners in crime, who are counting on Chance to divert Matt from their course and make good their getaway.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Gib Dawson brings his beautiful Indian wife, Shona, in to Dodge for treatment of a badly infected hand wound, at a time when racial tensions are running high against the Comanches.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Ben and Ash are business partners and the best of friends, until a blow on the head changes Ben's personality and leads to a confrontation over a woman that may part the friends for good.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Over the protests of Richie, whose parents are out of town, Potsie invites three-stranded beauty pageant contestants to spend the night.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: It's a new experience for Richie when he becomes romantically attracted to an "older woman."

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley befriends a German Shepard at the kennel when its abusive owner claims he's a mad dog. Finding out all unadopted and unclaimed dogs are killed, she and Laverne have a sit-in. Can their efforts save him and all the other dogs?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Frank DeFazio loses some of his Christmas spirit when he has to cancel his yearly gathering for the homeless and poor. The girls and friends step in to help him keep the holiday meaningful for the less fortunate.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley and her brother think she's adopted as she doesn't resemble any Feeneys. Later at the hospital where Shirley was born the girls try to get the truth by accessing a private file room in disguise. Is Shirley not a true Feeney female?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: As Shirley goes back for a grocery item, Laverne's at the checkout line, winning a shopping spree. Shirley feels jealous of her, but soon Laverne sees she's forgotten her friend. The two then team up for an all-out 5 minute, Supermarket Sweep.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne shows Lenny a kindness and then gives him a kiss. Lenny now feels he loves her, and she's now his. No one can get through to him that this isn't the case, but Laverne hopes to let him down easy without completely breaking his heart.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork haplessly gets involved with a group of white supremacists.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy takes a job writing the Miss Lonely Hearts newspaper column and unknowingly encourages Jean to pursue a romantic relationship with Mork.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork decides to become a priest.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork becomes so hopelessly addicted to advertisements that they invade his dreams.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Fred confesses that he's having marital difficulties, so Mork and Mindy relay stories of their troubled times.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie lets fame go to his head when he takes a turn as a disc jockey at the local radio station.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: While in Chicago with their high school choir, Richie, Ralph, and Potsie sneak by their chaperons, wind up on the wrong side of an unsympathetic downtown nightclub owner, and win the sympathy of a kind-hearted cocktail waitress.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: To raise money for the big football game, the boys decide to start their own babysitting service. In Football Frolics, Richie, Potsie, and Ralph have their hopes set on seeing the big football game of the year, but tickets can't be found anywhere.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: When Fonzie sets a pigeon coop atop the Cunningham garage and the roof caves, Mr. Cunningham sues to collect damages. In Two Angry Men, Laverne and Shirley prevail upon Fonzie to care for a coop of pigeons.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Deliveries and Deadlines
programme.desc: New year; new beginnings. Pauly is dusting off the turntables and finally headed back out on tour. Deena's Baby Meatball #2 is almost here, and Mike is ready to officially become "Big Daddy Sitch." But nothing could prepare him for what happens next.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Snooki vs. The Rock
programme.desc: No longer pregnant, Deena has a meatball day with Snooki. Meanwhile, Vinny is no longer bi-coastal, Angelina is fed up, and Mike is struggling as he awaits the moment he can bring Baby Romeo home from the hospital.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Hollywood Shore
programme.desc: Vinny's realizes there's no place like home, Mike swaps out the prosciutto for placenta, and a rumor wreaks havoc on the girls' big West Coast trip.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Meatballs Don't Hike
programme.desc: The girls' trip to Hollywood takes a detour when they learn Vinny sold his house. Before everyone heads back, Vinny is gonna give them an LA experience they'll always remember but may want to forget because of all the fighting between Angelina & Vinny.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Two Baptisms and a Pet Psychic
programme.desc: Pauly D is headed to Jersey for the week, and it's time for everyone to meet baby Romeo. Meanwhile, Angelina needs clarity about her marriage, so she enlists the help of a pet psychic, and The Situation, gets ready for his "Blessification."

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation The Blessification
programme.desc: Mike feels reborn after being blessified, Angelina is feeling lost after a spiritual reading with a pet psychic, and the roomies get ready for their next family vacation.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation The Not-So-International Vacation
programme.desc: The gang heads out for a family vacation where Mike gets a geography lesson, Jenni is in for a big surprise, and conflict comes from an unexpected place.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Deena's Revenge
programme.desc: Pauly D learns how to play bingo, Angelina melts down without her luggage, Mike begins an investigation, and an alarming discovery has the roommates shook.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Happy Birthday, Vinny!
programme.desc: Things get heated after the roomies realize they've been pranked by Deena. And Snooki arrives just in time for a floating tiki bar, Mike's freedom party.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Best Party Planner Ever
programme.desc: A tropical storm rages; Snooki and Angelina re-enact their famous fight; and the roomies party on a boat that's also a mansion. Oh, and did we mention the sex therapist?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation The Sexpert
programme.desc: The Florida Keys get emotional when a sex therapist digs deep into Angelina and Chris's relationship. Then they get messy when the meatballs create an impromptu late-night talk show. And even messier when Mike finds a note from Pauly D.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation The Lie Detector Test
programme.desc: What truth will be uncovered when, on the last day, the roomies take on a lie detector test? Who will take gold on Wide World of Guidos? And, will Snooki ever find her wine?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Mike learns that blondes have more fun, Pauly takes over Madison Square Garden, and group chat is lit when pictures surface of Angelina in Mexico with a man who's not her husband.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Angelina tells her side of the story, Jenni and Nicole bribe Deena to spill the tea, and Pauly plans a good, old-fashioned OG vacation. Meanwhile, Mike and Lauren have a difficult decision to make about Mosey.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: The road to El Paso takes an unexpected turn when a bunch of rumors and allegations are given to Mike. And he sends them straight to group chat, where all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: The group heads to El Paso for the weekend to watch Pauly spin and join in on some line dancing. It's love at first bite when Mike eats his first Texas tacos, but it's anything but love between Angelina and the girls.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: The party continues when DJ Pauly D takes on El Paso and the meatballs take on an owl. But it's a FaceTime from Angelina that takes Mike over the edge.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan searches for the perfect townhouse for a bickering couple; Steve is under pressure to choose a new brokerage; Steve and Fredrik travel to St. Lucia to pitch buyers on ocean-side villas; Steve is forced to make a career-changing decision.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan tries to win back a billion dollar development by throwing an event; Steve is anxious to prove himself as he battles the elements to sell a penthouse; Fredrik takes on a stunning new building and is pressured to make a major celebrity sale.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Steve tries to find a buyer for a charming country home on a piece of land in Upstate New York; Ryan has two weeks to work his magic on a skyscraper; Fredrik tries to impress his clients by selling an apartment to actor Bruce Willis.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan is challenged with selling the biggest townhouse in the neighborhood; Steve tries to sell an apartment with a location flaw; Fredrik gets creative to market a billion-dollar project that's in shambles; Ryan and Emilia make a major decision.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik may need to go back to the 1980s to find a buyer for his listing; Ryan has to sell a mansion built on top of a freeway; Steve goes to upstate New York to help a billionaire client but realizes his listing may turn out to be a "Payne."

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.sub-title: A New York Upstate of Mind
programme.desc: Ryan views a seven-story townhouse featuring an indoor pool; Steve's event at the 160-acre Payne Estate features ax-throwing competitions and carriage rides to rein in a big-city buyer; Fredrik works hard to sell a home with extravagant décor.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan pitches his brand new seven-story Chelsea townhouse as a smart-home paradise for tech enthusiasts; Luis and Ronita explore the idea of reuniting; Fredrik's former assistant, Jordan, invites him to help close the deal on a new listing in Tribeca.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ronita decides her partnership with Luis needs a tuneup; Ryan is thrilled to land three luxury properties in NoHo, but he is quickly burdened with 233 other units... all of them rentals; Steve's own apartment becomes his latest listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Steve puts on a rubber mask to observe Jess at her first broker's open house; Fredrik follows a lead for his Tribeca listing; Ryan lands a beautifully renovated loft in Chelsea.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan bets a Chelsea loft commission on a table tennis match; Steve's girlfriend settles into their new home together; Fredrik thinks his Crosby listing's massive terrace could be perfect for trained pets; a new, up-and-coming agent joins the crew.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan interviews young agents for his new rental team; Steve and a childhood friend hit the gym to weigh all the investment properties they've seen; Tyler invites a famous mentalist to his Mercantile open house party; Fredrik hosts an open house.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik hustles for offers at his disco-themed open house; Steve hosts a book launching event at his open house; Tyler faces off with Ryan over a listing for a massive loft on Laight Street.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Steve works to install an elevator in his new listing; Tyler gets a wake-up call while hosting a morning open house; Fredrik's husband's love of New York turns chilling during a raging snowstorm; Ryan re-brands a nameless neighborhood.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan invites an illusionist to his open house; L.A. agent Josh Altman isn't thrilled that Fredrik is building a West Coast team; Steve's in a professional pickle; Tyler plans a horse carriage ride through Central Park for potential buyers.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan premieres a music video for his Tribeca loft; Tyler pitches the biggest listing of his career; Fredrik and Derek tour a rental home for themselves in Los Angeles, but local brokers don't give them a warm welcome; Steve gets blind-sided.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik has a run-in with L.A. agent Heather Altman at his open house; Ryan markets a beautiful Park Avenue apartment to mysterious buyers from a secret government; Steve realizes decisions at home are easier to make than decisions with developers.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik lands a prime listing in SoHo that everyone, except Tyler, says is amazing; Steve asks Jess to help with a Bedford-Stuyvesant listing, but their contrasting selling styles may sink the deal; a seller steers Ryan towards hiring Luis.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan and Luis host a dinner party to sell their listing but struggle to rein in Ramona Singer; Fredrik's listing isn't big enough to satisfy his buyer's needs, so he tries to sell her a different unit, even if it's one he doesn't represent.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan lists a unique $18 million townhouse with commercial space; Tyler gears up to sell his biggest listing ever; Steve snags a listing but must work to attract attention for this hidden gem; Kirsten comes in hot as the new broker on the block.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl leads a mission team to scavenge the military base he discovered; Maggie tells her story, prompting a new mission for survival that only Negan can lead; Eugene and his group go through assessment by the Commonwealth's paramilitary police.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie's mission takes the team through a subway tunnel, challenged by lurking walkers and a recalcitrant Negan; with Eugene's group, Yumiko seeks answers about her brother and demands expedited processing into the Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie's mission team gets separated and hunted by the Reapers; Carol, Rosita, Magna and Kelly attempt to catch horses for Alexandria; Judith, RJ, Hershel and Gracie cope with their parents going away.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Dog get captured by the Reapers; they are taken to the Meridian and reconnect with a familiar figure from their past.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron, Carol, Lydia, and Jerry go to the Hilltop ruins for blacksmith tools and nearby game; Eugene's group goes through orientation at the Commonwealth; Maggie and Negan trudge through the woods; Judith and the kids clash with teenagers.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Escaping from walkers, Connie and Virgil hide in a house occupied by mysterious creatures; Pope tests Daryl's loyalty to the Reapers with a conflicting mission; Kelly leaves Alexandria in search of Connie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie and Elijah learn a new survival tactic from Negan; Eugene's group clears walkers to pay their fines; Yumiko interviews for an upper-class job; Daryl learns more about Leah and the Reapers; Gabriel encounters a man of God.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Reapers defend Meridian from an incoming herd; Pope suspects Maggie is behind the attack, while Daryl treads carefully; Alexandrians scramble to protect themselves when a violent storm leaves them vulnerable to walkers.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Maggie, Gabriel, Negan and Elijah battle the Reapers for food; Aaron and the Alexandrians must survive a storm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The heroes experience Halloween in the Commonwealth; Daryl and Rosita undergo military training led by Mercer; Carol investigates Ezekiel's medical condition.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene looks for Stephanie after she mysteriously goes missing; Connie investigates a story on Trooper Davis; Carol helps Hornsby with a labor dispute at a drug farm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron and Maggie meet Gov. Pamela Milton as she tours Alexandria, Oceanside and Hilltop; Ezekiel finds himself lucky during a routine checkup; Eugene processes Max's story.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Lydia and Elijah help a stranger from another community called Riverbend; they run into Aaron, who tells them about a mission he embarked on with Gabriel as emissaries for the Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Lydia and Elijah help Aaron and Gabriel on a rescue mission; in the chaos, Negan finds himself watching over Hershel; Sebastian coerces Daryl and Rosita into pulling a heist.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Hornsby marches Daryl and troops to confront Maggie at Hilltop; after a harrowing heist, Rosita gets Connie, Kelly, Eugene, and Max to investigate the Miltons; Ezekiel helps hospital patients in need.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie prepares to defend Hilltop and the people of Riverbend against Hornsby; Hornsby hires Leah to kill Maggie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Maggie, Gabriel, Negan and Elijah battle the Reapers for food; Aaron and the Alexandrians must survive a storm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The heroes experience Halloween in the Commonwealth; Daryl and Rosita undergo military training led by Mercer; Carol investigates Ezekiel's medical condition.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene looks for Stephanie after she mysteriously goes missing; Connie investigates a story on Trooper Davis; Carol helps Hornsby with a labor dispute at a drug farm.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger picks the perfect Christmas tree and shares tips for keeping it healthy throughout the holidays. The guys ask "What is it?" And Tom shows the proper way to caulk a leaky window.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger shows an Oregon homeowner an innovative way to handle storm-water runoff. The guys ask "What is it?" Then, Tom shows a homeowner how to refinish her hardwood floors.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger replaces cracked flagstone front steps with bluestone. The guys ask "What is it?" Then, Richard visits a serious cook and helps her replace her old electric stove with a new gas range.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger shows Kevin several ways to determine the grade, or pitch, of a landscape. The guys ask "What is it?" Richard repairs a bathtub. Tom and Richard "see" what's inside a wall.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger Cook helps a homeowner install a new vinyl fence. Then host Kevin O'Connor heads to Omaha, Nebraska, where he helps install a protective epoxy coating on a homeowner's garage floor.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps a homeowner control her radiator’s temperature. The guys ask "What is it?" Tom helps squeeze a new refrigerator into an opening that's too small. Roger tames a tangle of bungee cords.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard solves a smelly dishwasher. The guys ask "What is it?" Roger helps a homeowner transplant a rose bush. Tom shows Kevin the proper way to change a circular saw blade.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom shows a homeowner how to replace a leaking skylight. The guys ask "What is it?" Electrician Peg Preble shows Kevin how to troubleshoot and repair a faulty 3-way light switch.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger helps a homeowner improve her lawn, starting with a simple soil test. The guys ask "What is it?" Richard and Kevin visit a home center to identify several different types of water supply pipes.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps a pair of Arizona homeowners install a new water softening system. Tom Silva shows a homeowner how to install fiber-cement shingles on his new backyard shed.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom shows how to save energy and money by increasing attic insulation. Roger makes a walkway safer by adding low-voltage landscape lighting. Richard replaces a homeowner’s old kitchen faucet.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard shows kids how to build a soccer goal using PVC pipes. Tom demonstrates how to build a pair of stilts. Roger shows a family how to build a sandbox and make replicas of fossils.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom installs an old mortised lockset on a new door. Richard helps a homeowner install a pellet stove Roger shows Kevin several different types of lawn mowers which do not require gasoline.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger replaces a set of rotten wooden stairs with granite. Kevin O'Connor shows the latest technology for deadbolt locks. Richard helps a homeowner replace leaky polybutylene pipes in his house.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: This special episode is dedicated to the life and work of tile expert Joe Ferrante. Joe worked on many projects for This Old House and Ask This Old House over 20 years.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard installs a "pressure reducing valve." Roger discusses which types of grass are best for climates and conditions. The guys ask "What is it?" Tom installs crown molding on kitchen cabinets.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard shows how to replace the parts inside a toilet tank. Roger shares tips on above-ground sprinklers and lawn watering. Tom shows how to build a plywood bookcase using portable power tools.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Ask This Old House kicks off its 7th season on PBS. Tom Silva prevents a garage roof from collapsing, the guys ask, "What is it?" and Roger helps two homeowners dry out their basement.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger shows how to transplant a large, mature tree, the guys ask, "What is it?" then, Richard helps two homeowners sleep better at night by quieting their noisy heating system.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin travels to Nashville, Tennessee, where he helps brighten up a kitchen with new pendant lighting. Then, houseplant expert Carrie Kelly shows Roger how to care for cacti and other succulents.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger helps repair damage done to a lawn when a new well was installed. The guys ask "What is it?" and Tom shows a homeowner how to make curved stair molding with red oak and simple power tools.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger transplants a giant Rhododendron bush. The guys ask, "What is it?" and then, Richard helps a homeowner increase water pressure with an electric water-pressure booster.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom shows Kevin how to repair damaged laminate countertops. Roger rebuilds a brick walkway. The guys ask, "What is it?" and then Richard shows different types of filters for forced-air HVAC systems.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom seals openings around doors, windows, and penetrations into a house. Richard reduces heating costs by installing a weather-responsive boiler control. Tom cools things with a whole-house fan.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom prepares a shower enclosure for tile using a new type of waterproofing system, the guys ask "What is it?" and Roger helps install a privacy screen using bushes and a decorative flower garden.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger helps homeowners build a retaining wall using pressure-treated timbers. The guys ask, "What is it?" then Richard has an easy fix for a kitchen faucet that is making a loud, shuddering sound.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps install a whole-house water filter. The guys ask, "What is it?", Tom helps a homeowner repair a hole in a rubber roof and Richard shares a tip for cutting PVC pipe without a saw.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: General contractor Tom Silva helps a homeowner repair a very dangerous deck, the guys ask "What is it?" and Roger helps a homeowner with a hydrangea bush that won't flower.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger helps homeowners break apart and remove a large boulder, the guys ask "What is it?", Richard fixes loose pipes inside a shower wall and Tom shares a tip for getting a secure grip on a hammer.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard replaces a tank-type water heater with a new "tankless" unit, the guys ask "What is it?", Roger levels a sagging concrete walkway by "mudjacking," and Tom shows how to remove hammer dents.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger fixes a sagging wooden gate, the guys ask "What is it?”, Tom replaces drafty basement windows with energy-efficient ones and Tom and Richard show how to use different types of foam insulation.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin and expert painter Rich O'Neil show how to prepare and paint oak kitchen cabinets. Tom Silva visits Connecticut homeowners in need of organization solutions for their cluttered cabinets.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.

programme.title: Flying Over Spanish Islands

Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey takes three Cornwell toolboxes and turns them into drivable vehicles by pulling parts from junk yards, Craigslist and Facebook Marketplace.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Now that the old Bird's suspension is beefed up, Stacey has to make sure it's going to stop, so he outfits it with some massive Baer brakes.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey rolls in what could be the ultimate open-air fun machine, an original Meyers Manx dune buggy; these crazy, colorful, fiberglass-bodied buggies were not only beyond cool, they also started a revolution of affordable do-it-yourself projects.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: There was a time when vans ruled the custom scene; like lightning from a wizard's wand, they disappeared; vans are back, and Stacey has a few tricks up his sleeve to turn that dumpy old phone service or laundry van into a sweet street machine.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: The crazy yellow van is getting a facelift; good riddance to that clunky plastic face, and hello to some real steel; Stacey shows how to build brackets to relocate the headlights, keeping them fully adjustable and serviceable.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: The fast, strong and mean diesels gather once a year in Indianapolis for the diesel-only Ultimate Callout Challenge; an all-out event that pits driver against driver in drag racing, dyno runs and the sled pull.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey unboxes a 570-horsepower GM Performance LS 427, a matching 6L80E transmission and the plug and play kit that allows it to be installed in virtually anything; the engine needs a few extras before Stacey can drop it into the classic Chevy van.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey shows how to plan in a way that will save time, frustration and money; by laying out parts and planning each step, projects go together quicker, while also allowing time for delays or obstacles that come along.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: The team's next stop is Utah, where they must delve into car designer Tom Daniel's life and gain insight into what made him a hot-rodding genius.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.sub-title: The Copperhead Story - Anatomy of an Icon

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Maintenance and upgrades that can be done to a classic vehicle to keep and increase the value; what should be left alone to ensure the value of the original build is maintained.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey marries a zero-turn mower with a Cornwell toolbox to create the world's first zero-turn tool box. Later, he takes out for a test drive, but he's also going to show you all the steps it took to build it!

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey shows how to tell an original from a clone by rolling in the real Copperhead; a replica that sold at a recent auction; he introduces an all-female crew making waves rebuilding carburetors, then heads to the 2023 Grand National Roadster show.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey rolls in a rare 1967 Jeepster and shows how to successfully change the direction of a project when it throws you a major curveball; checking out the Keep On Truckin' event at the Grand National Roadster Show.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.sub-title: Lil' Red Wagon Interior (Featuring Carpet Stains and Mouse Pee)
programme.desc: Stacey uses his old Lil' Red Wagon Dodge to show how to stop the deterioration cycle that sets in when a vehicle sits for an extended period of time; he shows how to look past the faded paint and flat tires to focus on things that matter.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: To pay tribute to the early hot rod spirit, Stacey rolls in a 1940 Chevy coupe and puts together a hot small block to go in it; multiple carbs, finned aluminum and plenty of horsepower are just some of the magic ingredients that make this rod roar.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: The Little Red Wagon is back on the chopping block, as Stacey continues upgrading the interior of this well-worn '99 Dodge truck; he adds new carpet and headliner, repaints the door panels and changes the interior color, all on a reasonable budget.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: When laying out a hot rod build, a lot of people make the mistake of overlooking the chassis and frame; Stacey digs into a full frame replacement to make sure a 1940 Chevy can handle everything he's going to throw at it.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey proves that not all toolboxes are created equal with Cornwell's new ARCA series, then checks out a record-breaking '63 'Vette with a Cummins diesel; he digs into barn finds, picks accessories and exhaust for the '40 Chevy hot rod, and more.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey visits a father-and-son team who are literally upside down in their restoration of an old C10 pickup; back in the garage, Stacey shows the importance of a compressed air system for tools.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: In the start of Project Red Bird, Stacey digs into a well-worn '98 Trans Am to see if he can't unlock its hidden potential on a reasonable budget.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey digs into the rear suspension of the LS-powered '98 Trans Am to show how upgrading each component can improve handling.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: With the front and rear suspensions beefed up on project Red Bird, the '98 Trans Am should be ready to fly; Stacey has a few more upgrades that need to be addressed.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey takes three Cornwell toolboxes and turns them into drivable vehicles by pulling parts from junk yards, Craigslist and Facebook Marketplace.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Now that the old Bird's suspension is beefed up, Stacey has to make sure it's going to stop, so he outfits it with some massive Baer brakes.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey rolls in what could be the ultimate open-air fun machine, an original Meyers Manx dune buggy; these crazy, colorful, fiberglass-bodied buggies were not only beyond cool, they also started a revolution of affordable do-it-yourself projects.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: There was a time when vans ruled the custom scene; like lightning from a wizard's wand, they disappeared; vans are back, and Stacey has a few tricks up his sleeve to turn that dumpy old phone service or laundry van into a sweet street machine.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: The crazy yellow van is getting a facelift; good riddance to that clunky plastic face, and hello to some real steel; Stacey shows how to build brackets to relocate the headlights, keeping them fully adjustable and serviceable.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: The fast, strong and mean diesels gather once a year in Indianapolis for the diesel-only Ultimate Callout Challenge; an all-out event that pits driver against driver in drag racing, dyno runs and the sled pull.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey unboxes a 570-horsepower GM Performance LS 427, a matching 6L80E transmission and the plug and play kit that allows it to be installed in virtually anything; the engine needs a few extras before Stacey can drop it into the classic Chevy van.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey shows how to plan in a way that will save time, frustration and money; by laying out parts and planning each step, projects go together quicker, while also allowing time for delays or obstacles that come along.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: The team's next stop is Utah, where they must delve into car designer Tom Daniel's life and gain insight into what made him a hot-rodding genius.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.sub-title: The Copperhead Story - Anatomy of an Icon
programme.desc: About 20 years ago, Stacey builds a 67' C10 truck called "Copperhead"; from it's humble beginnings of just a frame, nobody dream that the truck would go on to become a highly influential truck.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Maintenance and upgrades that can be done to a classic vehicle to keep and increase the value; what should be left alone to ensure the value of the original build is maintained.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey marries a zero-turn mower with a Cornwell toolbox to create the world's first zero-turn tool box. Later, he takes out for a test drive, but he's also going to show you all the steps it took to build it!

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey shows how to tell an original from a clone by rolling in the real Copperhead; a replica that sold at a recent auction; he introduces an all-female crew making waves rebuilding carburetors, then heads to the 2023 Grand National Roadster show.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.sub-title: The Cheetah Big Booty and Steering Upgrades
programme.desc: The Cheetah is back in the shop after some major frame modifications, planting this 630hp cat's booty firmly to the ground; Stacey shows the benefits of a leaner, strong rear end, along with matching brakes, while the front end also gets upgrades.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey rolls in a rare 1967 Jeepster and shows how to successfully change the direction of a project when it throws you a major curveball; checking out the Keep On Truckin' event at the Grand National Roadster Show.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: The '67 Jeepster is back, as Stacey goes underneath and deals with the saggy suspension, faded brakes and oh-so-many leaks. It's all part of a continuing level-1 restoration, and well within the scope of what most people can do in their own garage.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey visits the Lions Automobilia Museum to tell the story of the iconic Lions Drag Strip, home to hot-rodders and drag racers from 1955 to 1972; he turns back the clock to a time when a guy could swap a cam and a carb, then show up ready to race.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: All Up In My Grill

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
